briefdescription.para: creates polyline from one contour (open or closed)
creates polyline from several contours (each can be open or closed)

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< VertId > &comp2firstVert, Vector< V, VertId > ps)
memberdef.name: Polyline

detaileddescription.para:
creates comp2firstVert.size()-1 not-closed polylines each pair (a,b) of indices in
comp2firstVert
defines vertex range of a polyline [a,b)
ps
point coordinates
adds connected line in this, passing progressively via points *[vs, vs+num)

if closed argument is true then the last and the first points will be additionally connected
the edge from first new to second new vertex
adds connected line in this, passing progressively via points *[vs, vs+num)

if num > 2 && vs[0] == vs[num-1] then a closed line is created
the edge from first new to second new vertex

memberdef.argsstring: (const Polyline< V > &from, const UndirectedEdgeBitSet &mask, VertMap *outVmap=nullptr, EdgeMap *outEmap=nullptr)
memberdef.name: addPartByMask

briefdescription.para: appends polyline (from) in addition to this polyline: creates new edges, verts and points

detaileddescription.para: tightly packs all arrays eliminating lone edges and invalid verts and points, optionally returns mappings: old.id -> new.id

briefdescription.para: returns coordinates of the edge origin
returns coordinates of the edge destination
returns a point on the edge: origin point for f=0 and destination point for f=1
computes coordinates of point given as edge and relative position on it
returns edge's centroid
returns vector equal to edge destination point minus edge origin point
returns line segment of given edge
converts vertex into edge-point representation
converts edge and point's coordinates into edge-point representation
returns Euclidean length of the edge
returns squared Euclidean length of the edge (faster to compute than length)

detaileddescription.para: calculates directed loop area if iterating in e direction .z = FLT_MAX if e does not represent a loop

briefdescription.para: returns total length of the polyline
returns average edge length in the polyline
returns cached aabb-tree for this polyline, creating it if it did not exist in a thread-safe manner
returns cached aabb-tree for this polyline, but does not create it if it did not exist
returns the minimal bounding box containing all valid vertices (implemented via getAABBTree())

detaileddescription.para: passes through all valid points and finds the minimal bounding box containing all of them
if toWorld transformation is given then returns minimal bounding box in world space

briefdescription.para: computes average position of all valid polyline vertices
applies given transformation to all valid polyline vertices

detaileddescription.para: split given edge on two parts: dest(returned-edge) = org(e) - newly created vertex, org(returned-edge) = org(e-before-split), dest(e) = dest(e-before-split)

briefdescription.para: same, but split given edge on two equal parts
Invalidates caches (e.g. aabb-tree) after a change in polyline.

detaileddescription.para: convert Polyline to simple contour structures with vector of points inside

if all even edges are consistently oriented, then the output contours will be oriented the same
vertMap
optional output map for for each contour point to corresponding VertId

briefdescription.para: convert Polyline3 to Polyline2 or vice versa

detaileddescription.para:
adds path to this polyline
the edge from first new to second new vertex

adds path to this polyline
the edge from first new to second new vertex

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, const MeshTriPoint &start, const SurfacePath &path, const MeshTriPoint &end)
memberdef.name: addFromGeneralSurfacePath

detaileddescription.para:
adds general path = start-path-end (where both start and end are optional) to this polyline
the edge from first new to second new vertex

briefdescription.para: returns the amount of memory this object occupies on heap

memberdef.definition: std::enable_if_t< std::is_same_v< Q, Vector3f > > MR::Polyline< V >::mirror
memberdef.name: mirror

briefdescription.para: reflects the polyline from a given plane. Enabled only for Polyline3f

detaileddescription.para: polyline that stores points of type V
